params.content:
[package]
name = "vector-db-skeleton"
version = "0.1.0"
edition = "2021"

[dependencies]
axum = "0.7"
tokio = { version = "1", features = ["full"] }
serde = { version = "1", features = ["derive"] }
serde_json = "1"
parking_lot = "0.12"
rayon = "1.8"

[profile.release]
lto = true
codegen-units = 1
debug = true
target-cpu = "native"

params.summary: Implemented correct exact distance calculation and parallelization across requests, then used parallel search splits for large datasets with standard Rust binary heap implementation and AVX-512 distance search

output.status: Evaluation complete. Summary: Implemented correct exact distance calculation and parallelization across requests, then used parallel search splits for large datasets with standard Rust binary heap implementation and AVX-512 distance search. Final QPS: 49.45, Recall: 0.9994
